title: OREGON HEALTH INSURANCE MARKETPLACE - 211info
text: NOWIA UNETE OREGON HEALTH INSURANCE MARKETPLACE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assistance with navigating the Oregon Health Insurance Marketplace website. Referrals to private insurance agents when necessary. 607 W Main Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-8pm Email (541) 245-1625 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 245-1625 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Entrance off Mistletoe Street Services: Navigator Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - FAMILIAS ESPECIALES HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OHP ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE LEGAL SERVICES - CANNABIS WORKER RESILIENCE PROJECT LEGAL SERVICES - ECO NAVIGATION SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NOWIA UNETE
